search.query: eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=userDetails OR mso_api_endpoint=userRoles | stats count by mso_host

p.i: Data is not available in selected time range or Orchestrator data collection is not configured. Try expanding the time range or configure the account: Configuration Page

html.p: Note: This dashboard won't be loaded with Orchestrator deployed on Nexus Dashboard.

search.query: eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=userDetails mso_host=$mso_token$ | dedup id | table username, id, firstName, lastName, emailAddress, accountStatus | rename username as "User Name", emailAddress as "Email Address", accountStatus as "Account Status" firstName as "First Name" lastName as "Last Name" id as "ID"

eventtype="cisco_dc_nd_mso" mso_api_endpoint=userAllowedRoles mso_host=$mso_token$ | dedup id | table username, id, userPreferences_autoSave, userPreferences_whatsNew | rename username as "User Name" id as "ID" userPreferences_autoSave as "User Preference (Auto Save)" userPreferences_whatsNew as "User Preference (What's New)"
